old: Emergency if no power, burning smell, or sparking panel.
Emergency routing: call technician line 214-555-0133 first, then manager 214-555-0134.
Non-emergency work orders are collected and reviewed same day when possible.
new: Emergency if no power, burning smell, or sparking panel.
Emergency routing: call technician line 214-555-0133 first, then manager 214-555-0134.
Non-emergency work orders are collected and reviewed same day when possible.
Emergency calls must route first to 214-555-0134 and then 214-555-0133.
Non-emergency requests should be collected for next business day scheduling.

changes.old: Emergency if no power, burning smell, or sparking panel.
changes.new: Emergency calls must route first to 214-555-0134 and then 214-555-0133.

changes.old: Non-emergency work orders are collected and reviewed same day when possible.
changes.new: Non-emergency requests should be collected for next business day scheduling.

changes.old: If nobody answers, tell caller we will return the call quickly.
changes.new: If transfer fails after 60 seconds, inform caller an electrician will call within 30 minutes.

new: Do not create generator service jobs automatically in ServiceTrade.

changes.old: During office hours (Monday-Friday 07:30 AM-06:00 PM CST), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
changes.new: During office hours (Monday-Friday 08:00 AM-05:00 PM CST), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
